overview: This arachnid is a lynx spider, likely from the genus Oxyopes, commonly found actively hunting prey on leaves. It is characterized by long, slender legs covered in prominent spines used to capture prey. These hunting spiders do not build webs but instead ambush or stalk their prey, similar to a lynx.
